name: EMI Analyzer
metaTitle: EMI Analyzer — Real Cost of Your Loan | Financial Simulators
metaDescription: Compare loan EMIs across tenures. See total interest, real cost after inflation, and prepayment impact. Client-side, no PII.
shortDescription: Compare loan EMIs with real cost

faq.question: How much interest do I pay on a home loan?
faq.answer: On a ₹50L home loan at 8.5% for 20 years, you pay approximately ₹54.7L in interest — more than the principal. The real cost after inflation is lower, but still significant.

faq.question: Should I choose a shorter or longer loan tenure?
faq.answer: Shorter tenures have higher EMIs but much less total interest. A 15-year loan at 8.5% saves roughly ₹20L in interest vs a 25-year loan on the same amount.

faq.question: How does prepayment reduce my loan cost?
faq.answer: A single prepayment of ₹5L on a ₹50L loan in year 5 can reduce your total interest by ₹12-15L and shorten the loan by 3-4 years.

howToSteps.name: Enter loan amount
howToSteps.text: Set the principal amount you want to borrow

howToSteps.name: Set interest rate and tenure
howToSteps.text: Adjust the rate and tenure to see different EMI options

howToSteps.name: Compare total cost
howToSteps.text: See total interest paid vs principal across tenures

howToSteps.name: Add prepayments
howToSteps.text: Toggle prepayment to see how it reduces total cost
